content: We can frame Self-Refine, the existing iterative no-training LLM output refinement framework, as a single-perspective baseline that can be extended by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to build a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework. This hybrid framework retains the original advantage of requiring no supervised data, extra training, or reinforcement learning while fixing the limitation of one-sided self-feedback that often gets stuck in local optima.
